name: The Nipple Talk
overview: Pony and her college friends Leslie and Xuan navigate their romantic journeys, exploring their desires and emotional needs through relationships with different partners. Despite diverse orientations, they support each other in overcoming personal flaws to pursue love that feels true and fulfilling, embracing the core spirit of love without labels or boundaries.

trailers.title: Taiwanese series "The Nipple Talk" trailer! on air on 11.08👀
